name: Unreal Engine
title: Unreal Engine Game Development
subtitle: Epic's industry-leading engine for games, film, and real-time experiences.
summary: Unreal Engine 5 (UE5) is the most powerful game engine of 2026 — used for AAA games, Hollywood virtual production (The Mandalorian), architectural walkthroughs, and real-time experiences. This course covers Unreal's full stack: project setup + interface, Blueprints visual scripting, level design with Nanite + Lumen, materials and rendering, gameplay framework (Pawns + Controllers + GameMode), and shipping a game. Practical workflows from indie to studio scale.

modules.title: Unreal Engine foundations
modules.objective: Navigate UE5; understand projects + assets + the editor.

lessons.title: Importing assets from Blender, Maya, and elsewhere

modules.title: Blueprints — visual scripting
modules.objective: Build gameplay logic without writing C++.

lessons.title: Blueprint basics — nodes and execution flow

modules.title: Level design and Nanite + Lumen
modules.objective: Build worlds that look like 2026's best games.

lessons.title: Performance — keeping a smooth frame rate

modules.title: Gameplay framework and shipping
modules.objective: Structure your game; ship to platforms.
